name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn
State == <<state, turn>>

(* Initial condition *)
Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
       /\ turn \in 1..N
       /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] = idle

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state[p] = idle
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = trying]
          /\ turn' = turn
       \/ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state[p] = trying
          /\ turn = p
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = critical]
          /\ turn' = turn
       \/ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state[p] = critical
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = idle]
          /\ turn' = (p + 1) \mod N + 1

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* Queue is represented as a sequence of length K *)
Queue == [i \in 1..K |-> q[i]]

(* The queue is empty when count = 0 *)
Empty == count = 0

(* The queue is full when count = K *)
Full == count = K

(* The queue is bounded: each element is an integer *)
Bounded == \A i \in 1..K : q[i] \in Int

(* The queue is a FIFO: head points to the next element to consume,
   tail points to the next position to produce into *)
ValidPointers == head \in 1..K /\ tail \in 1..K

(* The queue is consistent: count is the number of elements in the queue *)
Consistent == count = Len(Queue)

(* The queue is well-formed: all elements are integers and pointers are valid *)
TypeOK == Bounded /\ ValidPointers /\ Consistent

(* The producer action: if not full, produce an element *)
Produce(x) == 
  /\ \E i \in 1..K : q[i] = 0
  /\ q[tail] = x
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

(* The consumer action: if not empty, consume an element *)
Consume == 
  /\ \E i \in 1..K : q[i] # 0
  /\ q[head] = 0
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

(* The next-state relation: either produce or consume *)
Next == 
  \/ \E x \in Int : \E i \in 1..K : q[i] = 0 /\ Produce(x)
  \/ \E i \in 1..K : q[i] # 0 /\ Consume

(* The initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
  /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ count = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ==

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSet, ProcessSet

VARIABLES state, channel, markerSent, snapshotTaken, snapshotState, snapshotChannel
channels == [p \in ProcessSet, q \in ProcessSet |-> channel[p][q]]
markers == [p \in ProcessSet, q \in ProcessSet |-> markerSent[p][q]]
snapshots == [p \in ProcessSet |-> snapshotTaken[p]]
snapState == [p \in ProcessSet |-> snapshotState[p]]
snapChannel == [p \in ProcessSet, q \in ProcessSet |-> snapshotChannel[p][q]]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state \in [ProcessSet -> Int]
        /\ channel \in [ProcessSet, ProcessSet -> FiniteSet(Int)]
        /\ markerSent \in [ProcessSet, ProcessSet -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ snapshotTaken \in [ProcessSet -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ snapshotState \in [ProcessSet -> Int]
        /\ snapshotChannel \in [ProcessSet, ProcessSet -> FiniteSet(Int)]
        /\ \A p \in ProcessSet : state[p] = 0
        /\ \A p, q \in ProcessSet : channel[p][q] = {}
        /\ \A p, q \in ProcessSet : markerSent[p][q] = FALSE
        /\ \A p \in ProcessSet : snapshotTaken[p] = FALSE
        /\ \A p, q \in ProcessSet : snapshotChannel[p][q] = {}

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \A p \in ProcessSet : 
          /\ state[p] \in Int
          /\ channel[p][q] \in FiniteSet(Int)
          /\ markerSent[p][q] \in BOOLEAN
          /\ snapshotTaken[p] \in BOOLEAN
          /\ snapshotState[p] \in Int
          /\ snapshotChannel[p][q] \in FiniteSet(Int)
        \/ \A p, q \in ProcessSet : 
          /\ \E msg \in Int : 
              /\ msg \in channel[p][q]
              /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = @ \ {msg}]
              /\ state' = state
              /\ markerSent' = markerSent
              /\ snapshotTaken' = snapshotTaken
              /\ snapshotState' = snapshotState
              /\ snapshotChannel' = snapshotChannel
        \/ \A p, q \in ProcessSet : 
          /\ markerSent[p][q] = FALSE
          /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![p][q] = TRUE]
          /\ state' = state
          /\ channel' = channel
          /\ snapshotTaken' = snapshotTaken
          /\ snapshotState' = snapshotState
          /\ snapshotChannel' = snapshotChannel
        \/ \A p \in ProcessSet : 
          /\ snapshotTaken[p] = FALSE
          /\ snapshotTaken' = [snapshotTaken EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
          /\ snapshotState' = [snapshotState EXCEPT ![p] = state[p]]
          /\ snapshotChannel' = [snapshotChannel EXCEPT ![p][q] = {} \forall q \in ProcessSet]
          /\ state' = state
          /\ channel' = channel
          /\ markerSent' = markerSent
        \/ \A p, q \in ProcessSet : 
          /\ snapshotTaken[p] = TRUE
          /\ markerSent[p][q] = TRUE
          /\ markerSent' = markerSent
          /\ state' = state
          /\ channel' = channel
          /\ snapshotTaken' = snapshotTaken
          /\ snapshotState' = snapshotState
          /\ snapshotChannel' = [snapshotChannel EXCEPT ![p][q] = @ \cup channel[p][q]]
          /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = {}]

(* Invariant: all channels are finite sets *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [ProcessSet -> Int]
          /\ channel \in [ProcessSet, ProcessSet -> FiniteSet(Int)]
          /\ markerSent \in [ProcessSet, ProcessSet -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ snapshotTaken \in [ProcessSet -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ snapshotState \in [ProcessSet -> Int]
          /\ snapshotChannel \in [ProcessSet, ProcessSet -> FiniteSet(Int)]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, markerSent, snapshotTaken, snapshotState, snapshotChannel>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, Values

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenBy
\* Highest promised ballot by an acceptor
HighestPromised(a) == promises[a][1]
\* Highest accepted ballot by an acceptor
HighestAccepted(a) == accepts[a][1]
\* Value accepted by an acceptor
AcceptedValue(a) == accepts[a][2]
\* Value chosen by an acceptor
ChosenValue(a) == chosenBy[a]

\* Initial state
Init == /\ acceptors = {1, 2, ..., N}
        /\ proposers = {1, 2, ..., M}
        /\ promises = [a \in acceptors |-> [1 |-> 0, 2 |-> NULL]]
        /\ accepts = [a \in acceptors |-> [1 |-> 0, 2 |-> NULL]]
        /\ chosen = {}
        /\ chosenBy = [v \in Values |-> NULL]

\* Proposer sends Prepare to all acceptors
Prepare(p, b) == /\ b > HighestPromised(a) for all a \in acceptors
                  /\ promises' = [a \in acceptors |-> [1 |-> b, 2 |-> NULL]]
                  /\ accepts' = accepts
                  /\ chosen' = chosen
                  /\ chosenBy' = chosenBy

\* Acceptors respond to Prepare
Promise(a, b, v) == /\ b = HighestPromised(a)
                     /\ promises' = [a \in acceptors |-> [1 |-> b, 2 |-> v]]
                     /\ accepts' = accepts
                     /\ chosen' = chosen
                     /\ chosenBy' = chosenBy

\* Proposer sends Accept to all acceptors
Accept(p, b, v) == /\ b > HighestAccepted(a) for all a \in acceptors
                   /\ accepts' = [a \in acceptors |-> [1 |-> b, 2 |-> v]]
                   /\ promises' = promises
                   /\ chosen' = chosen
                   /\ chosenBy' = chosenBy

\* Acceptors respond to Accept
Accepted(a, b, v) == /\ b = HighestAccepted(a)
                     /\ accepts' = [a \in acceptors |-> [1 |-> b, 2 |-> v]]
                     /\ promises' = promises
                     /\ chosen' = chosen
                     /\ chosenBy' = chosenBy

\* Value chosen by an acceptor
Chosen(a, v) == /\ v \in chosen
                /\ chosenBy[v] = HighestAccepted(a)

\* Next-state relation
Next == \/ /\ \E p \in proposers : \E b \in Values : \E v \in Values :
          /\ Prepare(p, b)
          /\ \E a \in acceptors :
              /\ Promise(a, b, v)
          /\ \E a \in acceptors :
              /\ Accept(p, b, v)
          /\ \E a \in acceptors :
              /\ Accepted(a, b, v)
          /\ \E a \in acceptors :
              /\ Chosen(a, v)
        \/ /\ \E a \in acceptors : \E b \in Values : \E v \in Values :
          /\ Chosen(a, v)

\* Invariant : chosen values are never changed
TypeOK == /\ \A a \in acceptors, v \in Values
          /\ Chosen(a, v) => chosenBy[v] = HighestAccepted(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenBy>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY, SeqIndices
VARIABLES channel, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> -> SubSeq(file, i, CHUNK_SIZE)]
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \notin SeqIndices(sent_chunks)
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, [chunk |-> chunks[i], loss |-> Random < CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY])
        /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, chunks[i])
        /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, 0)
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \in SeqIndices(sent_chunks)
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, [chunk |-> chunks[i], loss |-> Random < CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY])
        /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, RetransmitCount(i) + 1)
        /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
    \/ /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
            /\ i \in SeqIndices(sent_chunks)
            /\ RetransmitCount(i) >= MAX_RETRIES
            /\ channel' = channel
            /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
            /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count

RetransmitCount(i) ==

        retransmit_count[i]

        0

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>
